findings.claim: The experiment assumes that the 36-month dataset is representative of future data.
findings.failure_mechanism: The dataset may not capture future changes in customer behavior, ticket characteristics, or operational processes.
findings.evidence_test: Monitoring model performance on future data and comparing it to the results obtained in this experiment.

findings.claim: The post-hoc audit for response phrases may not detect all forms of contamination.
findings.failure_mechanism: The audit may miss subtle or context-dependent phrases that indicate contamination.
findings.evidence_test: Manual review of a sample of tickets to verify the effectiveness of the post-hoc audit.

critic_r1_output.summary: The experiment design is sound, and the evaluation strategy is appropriate. Minor concerns regarding dataset representativeness and contamination detection are noted but do not impact the validity of the experiment.

adjudicator_output.case_rationale: no advancing findings from critic R1
